header.what: Test vectors for the transport recurrence 2^{sigma_r} R_{r+1} = 3^{m_r} R_r + (2^{s_r}-1) q (cycles.md Remark 12.6.1.1), the seam identity N_r + q = 2^{m_r} R_r, and the divisibility/gcd corollaries (= reverse.md Lemma 14.15.9.2 in integer form). For cross-stack consumers, in the first instance the Lean artifact of the integer-form recurrence (E. Merle).
header.warranty: Every row (every R_r, N_r, and (n, K, q)) was computed by two independent implementations -- experiments/make_transport_vectors.py (this file's generator, fresh prefix-sum code) and experiments/merle_round3_check.py (the round-3 verification script) -- which agree exactly on every emitted row. All boolean blocks are true.
header.conventions: n = sum(m_t); K = sum(s_t) + n; q = 2^K - 3^n signed and UNREDUCED; sigma_t = s_t + m_{(t+1) mod p}; R_r per 12.6.1 in rotation order starting at r; N_r per 14.15.9.1 on the rotated word with letters (m_i, r_i) = (m_i, s_i); reduced denominator = |q|/gcd(q, R_r); all big integers are decimal strings.

profiles.note: recorded p = 7 staircase seed (12.8.3, n = 94): a live reduction witness, gcd(q, R_r) = 7 shared across all seven rotations
the multi-letter probe's constant pair ((1,2),(1,2)): unreduced q = 55, gcd = 11, reduced denominator 5 (14.15.9's q = 5; the unreduced and reduced moduli differ exactly here)
the classical negative cycle -17, word ((4,1),(3,3)): q = 2^11 - 3^7 = -139, gcd = 139, reduced denominator 1 -- the integer-cycle (full-divisibility) branch, q < 0
trivial cycle as a fake period-1 profile: R_r = q = 4^1 - 3^1 at every rotation (12.6.1 sanity identity)
trivial cycle as a fake period-2 profile: R_r = q = 4^2 - 3^2 at every rotation (12.6.1 sanity identity)
trivial cycle as a fake period-3 profile: R_r = q = 4^3 - 3^3 at every rotation (12.6.1 sanity identity)
trivial cycle as a fake period-4 profile: R_r = q = 4^4 - 3^4 at every rotation (12.6.1 sanity identity)
trivial cycle as a fake period-5 profile: R_r = q = 4^5 - 3^5 at every rotation (12.6.1 sanity identity)
recorded 12.8.6.4 extension instance (n = 25217, corrected passer): R_r embedded as bit lengths only
